caption: OLG Frankfurt am Main, 7 UF 88/25 (Beschluss vom 5.1.2026)
court: Oberlandesgericht Frankfurt am Main (7. Familiensenat, sitting in Kassel)

parties.applicant: mother (Beschwerdeführerin — inferred from outcome shape; not stated in PM)

children.notes: Consistently refused father contact; aged ca. 11 at decision
Maintained regular father contact; aged ca. 5 at decision — sibling differentiation was determinative

procedural_history: Sorge-und-Umgangs-Verfahren before an unnamed Familiengericht (Amtsgericht) within the OLG Frankfurt district. The AG-instructed Sachverständige recommended residence-transfer of both children to the father on PAS / bindungsfeindliche-Beeinflussung grounds, with a reduced finding on the mother's Erziehungsfähigkeit. Beschwerde to the OLG Frankfurt am Main, 7. Familiensenat (which sits in Kassel). The Beschwerdeführer is not stated in the Pressemitteilung; the outcome shape (alleinige elterliche Sorge / Aufenthaltsbestimmungsrecht to the mother) is consistent with the mother having appealed. The OLG decided 5.1.2026; nicht anfechtbar.
summary: The Familiensenat of the OLG Frankfurt am Main operationalised BVerfG 1 BvR 1076/23 at OLG level by setting Sachverständigen-Mindestanforderungen for parental-alienation-framed family proceedings. A PAS-based Gutachten was held nicht tragfähig and its central reasoning a Zirkelschluss that is methodisch untauglich. The AG's residence-transfer order was replaced with alleinige elterliche Sorge to the mother; nicht anfechtbar. The decision marks the conversion of the BVerfG's constitutional holding into operational OLG-level guidance.
holding: A Sachverständigengutachten whose central reasoning rests on PAS or Eltern-Kind-Entfremdung as a construct is nicht tragfähig as a basis for residence- or contact-altering family-court orders. A child's refusal of contact with one parent cannot be inferred pauschal to be manipulation by the other parent; multi-factorial causal analysis is required. Sibling differentiation must be preserved. Repeated-appointment evaluators must meet the BRAK/DFGT *Mindestanforderungen* 3. Aufl. 2025 standard (Approbation, forensic Fachkunde, Methodentransparenz) in addition to the BVerfG-derived prohibition on PAS as construct.

verbatim_quotes.text: Verweigert ein Kind den Umgang mit einem Elternteil, kann das nicht pauschal darauf zurückgeführt werden, dass der Elternteil, bei dem das Kind wohnt, das Kind manipuliert.
verbatim_quotes.translation_en: If a child refuses contact with one parent, that cannot be inferred wholesale to be manipulation by the parent with whom the child resides.

verbatim_quotes.text: Ein auf das Konzept des sogenannten Parental Alienation Syndrom (PAS) gestütztes Gutachten ist als Grundlage einer kindeswohlorientierten Entscheidung nicht tragfähig; der dem PAS-Konstrukt zugrunde liegende Zirkelschluss ist methodisch untauglich.
verbatim_quotes.translation_en: A Gutachten based on the so-called Parental Alienation Syndrome (PAS) construct is not a sound basis for a child-welfare-oriented decision; the circular reasoning underlying the PAS construct is methodologically unsuitable.

outcome: AG-Anordnung der Aufenthaltswechsel zum Vater aufgehoben; alleinige elterliche Sorge einschließlich Aufenthaltsbestimmungsrecht auf die Mutter übertragen; Beschluss nicht anfechtbar.

comparative_jurisprudence.caption: BVerfG 17.11.2023 – 1 BvR 1076/23
comparative_jurisprudence.relevance: The constitutional ruling that this OLG decision operationalises.

comparative_jurisprudence.caption: Re Y [2026] EWFC 38
comparative_jurisprudence.relevance: Companion English EWFC decision (McFarlane P set aside unregulated PA-evaluator's findings) — parallel critique of evaluator quality in a same-year window.

comparative_jurisprudence.caption: Family Law Amendment Act 2023 (Cth) Sch 2
comparative_jurisprudence.relevance: Australian Court Children's Reports reform — parallel statutory tightening of expert-evidence standards in family proceedings.

comparative_jurisprudence.caption: CFP Nota Técnica nº 4/2022
comparative_jurisprudence.relevance: Brazilian Conselho Federal de Psicologia forensic-evaluator standards on PA — institutional counterpart to the OLG's evaluator-conduct holding.

subsequent_reception.summary: Deutscher Anwaltverein FamR lead editorial summary.
Interessenverband Unterhalt und Familienrecht — practitioner-press case note.

editorial_notes: Full Volltext not yet available in public databases (juris paywalled; rewis and openJur publication typically delayed several months for OLG-level Beschlüsse). Reconstruction relies on the OLG Pressemitteilung Nr. 03/2026 plus secondary practitioner press; every reconstructed point is tagged inline with [Pressemitteilung] or [DAV FamR 3/26] in the rendered article.
ECLI not yet assigned at time of writing.
Identity of the originating Amtsgericht not stated in the Pressemitteilung.
Beschwerdeführer not explicitly stated; mother inferred from outcome shape.
Senate composition (Vorsitzende:r / Berichterstatter) not in the Pressemitteilung.
Name of the Sachverständige not stated; preserved as Sachverständige A per the Court's anonymisation.
Counsel for both parties not named in the Pressemitteilung.
Explicit cross-reference to BVerfG Rn. 34 in the Beschluss text cannot be confirmed without the Volltext; the cite is reconstructed from PM language echoing the BVerfG holding.
No NJW / NZFam / FamRZ Anmerkung located at time of writing (early Jan 2026 decision).
Any Folgeentscheidungen (other OLGe applying it) and any BPtK / DFGT statement applying the Mindestanforderungen are flagged as forward-looking research.
author: Alan Markson
